subject: TSL Daily Digest — Mar 13, 2026
html:
TSL Internal

TSL Daily Digest

Friday, March 13, 2026  ·  For Sam & David

Key moves today

  • No new TSL meeting notes logged today. SF dinner event (last night, 13 attendees) and Cendana work session (today) likely happened — log notes in Granola when you get a chance.

Priorities for tomorrow

  1. productPitch deck upload demo — deadline ~Mar 18 (committed to Charlotte). DocSend extraction still the key blocker. Start here Monday.
  2. gtmLog notes from SF dinner + Cendana session in Granola while details are fresh — Monday digest will be richer for it.
  3. gtm(David) Inbound follow-ups from this week's SF meetings — flag any warm leads or LP intros worth moving on.

Strategy pulse

  • Vantager's MSCI acquisition is a strong signal that LP workflow tooling has M&A value — but Charlotte's frustration with the $7K payout suggests acqui-hire terms, not a product buyout. The lesson: GP integration + auditability is the moat worth building now, before a larger player replicates it.
  • The SF dinner format (13 LPs, poker fun-fact cards, LP-themed menu) is a differentiated community-building move. Worth documenting what landed and repeating for NYC in late April — Charlotte should weigh in on the invite list.

Open tasks

  • [David] Inbound follow-ups — carrying forward
  • [Sam] Pitch deck upload demo (deadline ~Mar 18) — from Charlotte sync, Mar 11
  • [Sam] DocSend extraction — from Charlotte sync, Mar 11
  • [Sam] Charlotte platform login — confirm she has access
  • [Sam] Introduce Charlotte to Ben & Will — from Charlotte sync, Mar 11
  • [Sam] Burgiss data follow-up with Charlotte — from Charlotte sync, Mar 11
  • [Sam] Email Cameron re: fund investment — from DZ Weekly, Mar 9
  • [Both] NYC event planning (late April) — Charlotte input needed on dates + invitees

No new TSL meetings logged Mar 12–13. Carrying forward from: Charlotte / Sam Sync (Mar 11), DZ Weekly (Mar 9)
